column1: # Sweep 22 — Clean 2000-step convergence run (the s13_locked_2000 we never got) (2026-04-20)
# Previous s13_locked_2000 attempt hit Spark contention, only ~400 steps completed in 9001s.
# Now Spark is free at 39K tok/s. Run the best stacked config for 2000 steps for real quant_bpb.
# The winner(s) from sweep_21 should be promoted here. Placeholder: 2 runs, best stack + baseline.
# Update before launching with the actual sweep_21 winner.
# 2000 steps × 32K tokens / 39K tok/s = ~1640s train + ~15 min eval/quant = ~42 min/run.
# TIMEOUT_SECS=3600 (60 min) covers even TTT_LR=0.001 slowdown.

column2: ITERATIONS=2000 MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=2700 QK_GAIN_INIT=5.5 WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.64 TTT_ENABLED=1 SLIDING_WINDOW_ENABLED=1 TTT_EPOCHS=1 EMA_DECAY=0.995 LOGIT_SOFTCAP=20 TIMEOUT_SECS=3600
